case_title: LISA PAN VS. LASSEN TOUR & TRAVEL INC.(CA)

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2014 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SIGNED) SERVED AUG-05-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LASSEN TOUR & TRAVEL INC.(CA) DBA LASSEN TOURS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAN, LISA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LASSEN TOUR & TRAVEL INC.(CA) DBA LASSEN TOURS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LASSEN TOUR & TRAVEL INC.(CA) DBA LASSEN TOURS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JUDY SWEN--VICE PRESIDENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,674.00 FILED BY PAN, LISA AS TO DEFENDANT LASSEN TOUR & TRAVEL INC.(CA) DBA LASSEN TOURS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
